page.title: Join Our Dermatology Network
page.description: Earn extra income with flexible teledermatology. No fixed costs, no subscriptions – just high-quality patient care on your terms.

benefits.title: Why Doctors Choose Telederm
benefits.description: Join a growing network of dermatologists who are transforming their practice with teledermatology.

income.title: Extra-Budgetary Income
income.description: Earn additional income outside your regular budget. No fixed costs, no minimum commitments – get paid per case.

flexibility.title: Maximum Flexibility
flexibility.description: Work from anywhere with a 48-hour processing window. Fit consultations around your schedule.

organization.title: Better Practice Management
organization.description: Relieve your staff and manage patient flow more efficiently. Reduce waiting room congestion.

support.title: Full Marketing Support
support.description: Receive professional marketing materials including business cards, flyers, and digital assets.

compliance.title: GDPR Compliant
compliance.description: All data processed on EU-based servers. Full compliance with medical data protection regulations.

training.title: Comprehensive Training
training.description: Get fully onboarded with our 45-minute training session. Ongoing support whenever you need it.

testimonials.title: What Our Partner Doctors Say
testimonials.description: Hear from dermatologists who are already part of our network.

mueller.quote: Telederm has transformed how I manage my practice. The flexibility to work from home while earning extra income is invaluable. The platform is intuitive and the support team is always responsive.

weber.quote: As a busy clinic owner, I was skeptical at first. But teledermatology has actually reduced my waiting room congestion and given my patients faster access to care. It's a win-win.

braun.quote: What I appreciate most is the quality of cases. The photo documentation is excellent, and the 48-hour response window means I never feel pressured. Perfect for work-life balance.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.description: From registration to your first patient – we make onboarding fast and simple.

register.title: Register Online
register.description: Complete your registration in just 10 minutes. Provide your LANR, BSNR, and bank details.

training.title: Complete Training
training.description: Schedule a 45-minute online training session at your convenience. Learn our platform inside and out.

start.title: Start Treating
start.description: Complete a test case and you're ready to go. Start receiving and treating patients immediately.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about joining our network.

requirements.question: What are the requirements to join?
requirements.answer: You need a valid medical license (Approbation), a LANR (Lebenslange Arztnummer), BSNR (Betriebsstättennummer), and professional liability insurance that covers telemedicine.

billing.question: How does billing work?
billing.answer: We handle all billing for you. Cases are billed according to GOÄ (Gebührenordnung für Ärzte). You receive monthly payouts directly to your bank account.

eprescription.question: Can I issue e-prescriptions?
eprescription.answer: Yes, our platform fully supports e-prescriptions (E-Rezept). You can issue digital prescriptions directly through the telederm interface.

liability.question: Am I covered for liability?
liability.answer: You should have professional liability insurance that explicitly covers telemedicine consultations. We can provide documentation for your insurer if needed.

time.question: How much time do I need to commit?
time.answer: There's no minimum commitment. You have 48 hours to process each case, and you can choose when and how many cases to accept.

platform.question: What technical requirements are there?
platform.answer: You just need a computer or tablet with internet access. Our platform is web-based – no special software installation required.

contact.title: Request More Information
contact.description: Leave your details and we'll send you comprehensive information about joining our network.

success.title: Thank you!
success.description: We've received your request and will be in touch within 24 hours.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
cta.description: Join 750+ dermatologists already earning with telederm. Registration takes just 10 minutes.
